content.thinking: Let me find all comments in the staged files. I need to search for single-line comments (//) and multi-line comments (/* */) in these files. Let me use a script to find files with comments first.

content.text: Now let me find all files with comments. I'll use a comprehensive approach to identify and remove them.

input.description: Find all comments in staged files
input.prompt:
Find all code comments (// and /* */ style) in the staged TypeScript/TSX/JS files. Run this command to get a list of files that contain comments along with the comment lines:

```
git diff --cached --name-only | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' | while read f; do
  if [ -f "$f" ]; then
    # Find single-line comments (// ...) and multi-line comments (/* ... */)
    # Exclude URLs (http://, https://), shebang lines, and eslint directives
    matches=$(grep -nE '^\s*//' "$f" | grep -v 'http://' | grep -v 'https://' | grep -v '^#!' | head -50)
    matches2=$(grep -nE '^\s*/\*' "$f" | head -20)
    matches3=$(grep -nE '^\s*\*' "$f" | grep -v 'import' | head -20)
    if [ -n "$matches" ] || [ -n "$matches2" ]; then
      echo "=== $f ==="
      [ -n "$matches" ] && echo "$matches"
      [ -n "$matches2" ] && echo "$matches2"
      [ -n "$matches3" ] && echo "$matches3"
      echo ""
    fi
  fi
done
```

Also search for inline comments (code followed by // comment):
```
git diff --cached --name-only | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' | while read f; do
  if [ -f "$f" ]; then
    # Find inline comments - lines with code then //
    matches=$(grep -nP '(?<!:)(?<!https?)//(?!/)\s' "$f" | grep -v 'http://' | grep -v 'https://' | head -30)
    if [ -n "$matches" ]; then
      echo "=== INLINE: $f ==="
      echo "$matches"
      echo ""
    fi
  fi
done
```

```
git diff --cached --name-only | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' | while read f; do
  if [ -f "$f" ]; then
```
```
    # Find inline comments - lines with code then //
    matches=$(grep -nP '(?<!:)(?<!https?)//(?!/)\s' "$f" | grep -v 'http://' | grep -v 'https://' | head -30)
    if [ -n "$matches" ]; then
      echo "=== INLINE: $f ==="
      echo "$matches"
      echo ""
    fi
  fi
done
```

data.prompt:
Find all code comments (// and /* */ style) in the staged TypeScript/TSX/JS files. Run this command to get a list of files that contain comments along with the comment lines:

```
git diff --cached --name-only | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' | while read f; do
  if [ -f "$f" ]; then
    # Find single-line comments (// ...) and multi-line comments (/* ... */)
    # Exclude URLs (http://, https://), shebang lines, and eslint directives
    matches=$(grep -nE '^\s*//' "$f" | grep -v 'http://' | grep -v 'https://' | grep -v '^#!' | head -50)
    matches2=$(grep -nE '^\s*/\*' "$f" | head -20)
    matches3=$(grep -nE '^\s*\*' "$f" | grep -v 'import' | head -20)
    if [ -n "$matches" ] || [ -n "$matches2" ]; then
      echo "=== $f ==="
      [ -n "$matches" ] && echo "$matches"
      [ -n "$matches2" ] && echo "$matches2"
      [ -n "$matches3" ] && echo "$matches3"
      echo ""
    fi
  fi
done
```

Also search for inline comments (code followed by // comment):
```
git diff --cached --name-only | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' | while read f; do
  if [ -f "$f" ]; then
    # Find inline comments - lines with code then //
    matches=$(grep -nP '(?<!:)(?<!https?)//(?!/)\s' "$f" | grep -v 'http://' | grep -v 'https://' | head -30)
    if [ -n "$matches" ]; then
      echo "=== INLINE: $f ==="
      echo "$matches"
      echo ""
    fi
  fi
done
```
